name: HubSpot API
description: HubSpot CRM platform for managing contacts, companies, deals, and marketing automation. Full access to CRM objects, pipelines, and engagement tracking.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: HubSpot is an all-in-one CRM platform for managing contacts, deals, and marketing campaigns. This plugin provides access to CRM contacts, companies, deals, pipelines, and engagement data.

required_credentials.name: Access Token
required_credentials.description: HubSpot Private App access token or OAuth access token

tools.name: Get Contacts
tools.description: Retrieve a list of contacts from HubSpot CRM

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to return (default: 10, max: 100)

after.description: Paging cursor for next page of results

properties.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include (e.g., 'firstname,lastname,email')

tools.name: Get Contact
tools.description: Get a specific contact by ID

contactId.description: The ID of the contact to retrieve

properties.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return

tools.name: Create Contact
tools.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM

properties.description: Contact properties object with fields like email, firstname, lastname, phone, company

contactId.description: The ID of the contact to update
The ID of the contact to delete

filterGroups.description: Array of filter groups for search criteria

query.description: Text search query across default searchable properties

properties.description: Array of property names to return

tools.name: Get Companies
tools.description: Retrieve a list of companies from HubSpot CRM

limit.description: Maximum number of companies to return

properties.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

tools.name: Create Company
tools.description: Create a new company in HubSpot CRM

properties.description: Company properties object with fields like name, domain, industry, city, country

tools.name: Get Deals
tools.description: Retrieve a list of deals from HubSpot CRM

limit.description: Maximum number of deals to return

properties.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

tools.name: Create Deal
tools.description: Create a new deal in HubSpot CRM

properties.description: Deal properties object with fields like dealname, amount, dealstage, closedate, pipeline

tools.name: Get Pipelines
tools.description: Get all deal pipelines and their stages

tools.name: Create Note
tools.description: Create a note engagement for a contact or deal

properties.description: Note properties: hs_note_body (content), hs_timestamp (Unix ms timestamp)

associations.description: Array of associations to link note to contacts/companies/deals
